About Us

AIvest Securities Limited is a securities company dedicated to providing intelligent and efficient investment solutions for global investors. We integrate artificial intelligence (AI) and big data analytics to offer clients precise market insights and innovative investment strategies.

Our Services

Service We Provide

Establish an investment strategy

We create personalized investment strategies based on the client's financial goals. Our AI-driven models provide real-time data and predictions to help guide investment decisions.

Precise Market Analysis

We combine technical analysis and fundamental analysis to provide clients with comprehensive market insights, including in-depth analysis of various markets such as stocks, bonds, futures, and more.

Risk Management

We regularly conduct stress tests on investment portfolios, simulating investment performance under different market scenarios. This helps assess potential extreme risks and prepares clients in advance to handle any challenges that may arise.

Determination of our core team

We tailor investment plans for each user based on their individual needs and financial goals.

AIvest Securities Limited is a securities company dedicated to providing intelligent and efficient investment solutions for global investors. We integrate artificial intelligence (AI) and big data analytics to offer clients precise market insights and innovative investment strategies.

Our mission is to empower investment through technology, enabling global investors to enjoy efficient, secure, and transparent financial services. Whether institutional or individual investors, AIvest Securities Limited will be your trusted investment partner.

Our vision is to become the world's leading intelligent investment platform, helping investors achieve their financial goals through innovative technology and excellent investment strategies. We are committed to driving the digital transformation of the financial markets, enabling every investor to make informed decisions in an efficient, transparent, and secure environment.
